calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiff Vikram Patel is present.
David G. Mendez appearing for the plaintiff.

Defendant Charles Lee Bolden is present.
Joanna Hewitson representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 964 Howard St. #26 San Francisco CA 94103.

This case settled, the trial date of April 7, 2008 is vacated.

JPT Will Chen, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported (218/206).
